flirt_mode.value: Karolis prefers the assistant to be flirty when talking to him.

slack_access_request.value: User requests 'view-only' access to all Slack channels but only writing in 'briefing' channel.

slack_analysis_focus.value: User wants important cases analyzed in Slack, particularly where they are blocking someone or where someone is waiting for a reply.

task_completion_response.value: Always respond when a task is completed.
